title: BTA Dynamic Projector
body:
# Dynamic Projector

Add dynamic light (aka moving light) in BTA.

This mod work on server but don't install it on server. (It will do nothing there)

This mod could make your game very laggy if there are too many moving light.

Requirements:

- BTA (https://www.betterthanadventure.net)
- Babric for BTA https://github.com/Turnip-Labs/babric-instance-repo/releases/tag/v7.3_04
